segments.caption: The video begins with a woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey polka-dotted sweater, speaking directly to the camera in a warm, earth-toned studio setting adorned with green plants and a decorative toucan figure. She gestures as she explains geological concepts, and a graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the screen illustrating four types of plate boundaries: Divergent, Convergent, Subducting Convergent, and Transform, each with labeled diagrams showing tectonic movement. The scene transitions to a stylized animated map with a text box stating, 'ALL OF WHICH BRING TOGETHER TWO KEY PHYSICAL GEOGRAPHY PLAYERS: GLOBAL TECTONIC SYSTEMS AND CLIMATE SYSTEMS. ESPECIALLY THROUGH WEATHERING,' accompanied by a cartoon rock character expressing emotion. The video then cuts back to the woman speaking, followed by a dynamic transition to breathtaking mountain landscapes—snow-capped peaks, rocky terrain, and a valley with glaciers. The camera pans across a vibrant display of colorful prayer flags fluttering in the wind against a mountain backdrop, then shifts to a lush, moss-covered cliff with cascading waterfalls feeding a rushing river. The segment concludes with the woman reappearing in the studio, continuing her explanation with expressive hand movements.

discovered_new_entities.Woman: A woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey sweater with black polka dots, speaking expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background.
discovered_new_entities.Plate Boundary Diagrams: Four labeled diagrams illustrating Divergent, Convergent, Subducting Convergent, and Transform plate boundaries, each with arrows and cross-sections showing tectonic movement.
discovered_new_entities.Animated Map with Text Box: A stylized world map background with a beige text box containing bold text about tectonic and climate systems, accompanied by a cartoon rock character with legs and facial expressions.
discovered_new_entities.Mountain Landscape: A panoramic view of snow-covered, rugged mountain peaks under a blue sky with clouds, featuring rocky terrain and glaciers.
discovered_new_entities.Prayer Flags: A dense cluster of colorful, fluttering prayer flags in red, blue, yellow, green, and white, set against a mountainous backdrop with people visible in the distance.
discovered_new_entities.Waterfall Scene: A steep, moss-covered cliff with multiple cascading waterfalls flowing into a turbulent river below, surrounded by greenery and rocks.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Woman speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting, surrounded by green plants and a decorative toucan in a wooden ring. She gestures expressively as she introduces the topic, and an animated graphic of a girl riding a bicycle appears in the upper right corner, transitioning into a forest scene with a small evergreen tree growing on a rocky outcrop. The scene then cuts to an animated desert landscape with a cartoon character and various text boxes explaining desert facts, followed by a vibrant title card for 'Crash Course Geography' featuring a stylized Earth and a cartoon character. The video then displays a comprehensive animated diagram illustrating the Hydrologic, Rock, and Tectonic cycles, with labeled components and arrows showing processes like evaporation, weathering, and subduction. The Rock Cycle is highlighted with anthropomorphized rocks (sedimentary sandstone, metamorphic gneiss, igneous granite, and magma) and text explaining that it is driven by internal (endogenic) and external (exogenic) forces. The Woman reappears, continuing her explanation, with a cartoon metamorphic rock character appearing beside her. She emphasizes the three types of rock—igneous, sedimentary, and metamorphic—while a text box appears on screen to reinforce the point. The overall tone is educational and engaging, using a mix of live-action and colorful animations to explain geological concepts.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Woman speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting, with a toucan decoration and green plants in the background. On-screen text introduces the three types of rock: igneous, sedimentary, and metamorphic. The scene transitions with a green-striped wipe to a panoramic Mountain Landscape, where the word 'SEDIMENTS' appears over a rocky valley with snow-capped peaks. This is followed by a close-up of a soil cross-section showing distinct layers, with grass and roots visible at the top. The video then cuts to a satellite view of a coastline with sediment plumes entering the ocean, followed by a sweeping shot of a glacier in a mountain valley, labeled 'EROSION'. An animated graphic with camping gear and text explains weathering and erosion as stages of denudation. The Woman reappears, continuing her explanation, and the segment ends with a green-striped transition and the text 'WEATHERED MANTLE' appearing on screen.

segments.caption: The video opens with a dynamic transition featuring diagonal green and white stripes overlaying a landscape, leading into an aerial view of a landslide with the text 'MASS MOVEMENT' displayed prominently. The scene shifts to a devastated urban alleyway filled with rubble and debris, reinforcing the concept of mass movement. The Woman appears in a studio setting, speaking expressively with hand gestures, surrounded by plants and a decorative toucan. The video then transitions to a red background with the text 'WHEN WATER TURNS INTO ICE IT INCREASES IN VOLUME BY 9%', followed by an animated sequence showing a cartoon rock character with legs standing on a cracked pipe as water freezes and expands beneath it. This is followed by a green-striped transition leading to a close-up of fractured rocks labeled 'FROST ACTION', then a panoramic mountain view with 'FREEZE-THAW CYCLES' text, and finally a wide shot of a rocky mountain slope labeled 'SCREE', illustrating the natural consequences of frost weathering and mass movement.

active_entities.Woman: A woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey sweater with black polka dots, speaking expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background.
active_entities.Animated Map with Text Box: A stylized red background with bold white text stating 'WHEN WATER TURNS INTO ICE IT INCREASES IN VOLUME BY 9%', followed by an animated grey pipe with a cartoon rock character with legs and a sad face standing on it as blue water freezes and expands beneath, causing the pipe to crack.
active_entities.Mountain Landscape: A panoramic view of snow-covered, rugged mountain peaks under a blue sky with clouds, featuring rocky terrain and glaciers, with the text 'FREEZE-THAW CYCLES' overlaid.

discovered_new_entities.Frost Action Scene: A close-up of large, fractured grey rocks in a rocky, grassy terrain, with the text 'FROST ACTION' displayed in a dark blue banner.
discovered_new_entities.Scree Scene: A wide-angle shot of a rocky mountain slope covered in loose, broken rock fragments, with the text 'SCREE' displayed in a dark green banner.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a weathered rock surface, showing pitted textures and erosion, with the text 'SALT CRYSTAL GROWTH' overlaid in bold white letters on a maroon banner. The scene transitions to the Woman, who speaks expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background, accompanied by a cartoon rock character with legs and a face that changes expression from neutral to sad. The video then cuts to a panoramic view of a red rock canyon with the text 'GRANULAR DISINTEGRATION' displayed, followed by shots of ancient cliff dwellings nestled in the rock face, showcasing their intricate stone architecture. The Woman reappears, continuing her explanation, before the video shifts to an animated educational graphic with the text 'WHEN ROCK BREAKS DOWN INTO PROGRESSIVELY SMALLER FRAGMENTS WITHOUT BEING ALTERED BY CHEMICALS, IT'S CALLED MECHANICAL WEATHERING.' This is followed by a detailed animated 'SOIL PROFILE' diagram, illustrating the O, A, E, B, and C horizons, with the C horizon labeled as 'REGOLITH' and 'PARTIALLY BROKEN DOWN PARENT MATERIAL,' set against a light brick wall background.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Woman speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting, surrounded by green plants and a decorative toucan figure on the wall. She gestures expressively as she introduces the topic of oxidation, and an animated graphic appears beside her showing a cartoon girl with a bicycle in a sunny outdoor scene. The scene transitions to a full-screen animated illustration of a rusted bicycle labeled 'IRON OXIDE (RUST)' with an arrow pointing to 'IRON' below, emphasizing the chemical process. A cartoon rock character with legs and a sad face appears next to the bicycle, also labeled with 'IRON OXIDE (RUST)' and 'IRON', illustrating the same process in rocks. A text box appears, defining chemical weathering as the alteration or decay of minerals in rocks by agents like water, oxygen, carbon, and organic acids. The video then cuts to a wide, scenic view of the Acropolis in Athens during sunset, showcasing the Parthenon and surrounding ruins under a colorful sky. The camera zooms in on the weathered columns of the Parthenon, highlighting visible signs of erosion and discoloration, reinforcing the concept of chemical weathering over time.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of the weathered stone columns of the Parthenon, highlighting erosion under a bright blue sky, transitioning to a detailed shot of a column’s capital showing discoloration and decay. The scene shifts to a studio setting where the Woman, with long wavy blonde hair and a grey polka-dot sweater, speaks directly to the camera against a warm-toned backdrop featuring a toucan decoration and green plants. As she explains, a chemical equation appears on screen: H₂O + CO₂ ⇌ H₂CO₃ (Water + Carbon Dioxide ⇌ Carbonic Acid), followed by the word 'CARBONATION' in bold, accompanied by an animated miner holding a soda can. The video then cuts to a natural scene of water dripping from a moss-covered rock, illustrating the process of carbonation. This is followed by an animated graphic with camping gear and text explaining that calcium carbonate reacts with carbonic acid to form calcium bicarbonate, which dissolves in water, weakening limestone—comparing it to oxidation weakening a bike frame. The segment concludes with a vibrant orange graphic titled 'KARST TOPOGRAPHY,' showing a world map of carbonate rock distribution and a cross-section diagram explaining how dissolving bedrock creates sinkholes, caves, and springs, associated with limestone, marble, and gypsum.

active_entities.Parthenon Columns Close-Up: A zoomed-in view of the weathered stone columns of the Parthenon, showing signs of erosion and discoloration under a bright blue sky.

segments.caption: The video begins with a vibrant orange graphic titled 'KARST TOPOGRAPHY,' featuring a world map highlighting the distribution of carbonate rocks and a cross-section diagram illustrating how dissolving bedrock creates sinkholes, caves, and springs, associated with limestone, marble, and gypsum. The scene transitions to an aerial view of the Karst Plateau in Slovenia, showcasing a small village nestled among lush greenery and towering limestone cliffs, with text labels appearing to list other karst regions like Southern China, Japan, Puerto Rico, Cuba, the Yucatan Peninsula, Kentucky, Indiana, New Mexico, and Florida. The camera then pans over dramatic karst features, including turquoise water-filled sinkholes and a river cutting through steep rock walls, before focusing on a large sinkhole surrounded by autumn-colored trees, with the word 'SINKHOLES' displayed prominently. The scene shifts to a studio setting where a woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey polka-dot sweater, speaks expressively in front of plants and a toucan decoration, with the word 'CAVES' appearing on screen, followed by a text box explaining that solution caves usually form between limestone and shale. The video then cuts to an animated character in a blue suit and yellow helmet standing before a cave entrance, with a speech bubble containing a skull and bones icon appearing beside them, suggesting danger or discovery within the cave.

discovered_new_entities.Animated Character: A cartoon figure in a blue suit and yellow helmet with a headlamp, standing before a cave entrance, with a speech bubble containing a skull and bones icon appearing beside them.

discovered_new_entities.Sinkhole and River Scenes: Aerial views of turquoise water-filled sinkholes and a river flowing through steep rock canyons, with the word 'SINKHOLES' displayed in a maroon banner over a large sinkhole surrounded by autumn foliage.

segments.caption: The video begins with an animated character, the Animated Character, standing before a cave entrance in a natural, rocky landscape with greenery and a small stream. The character, dressed in a blue suit and yellow helmet with a headlamp, gestures toward the cave, and speech bubbles appear showing icons of rocks, a skull, and bones, suggesting exploration or discovery themes. The scene transitions into the cave’s interior, revealing a vast underground chamber with a sandy floor, a calm turquoise pool, and scattered camping gear, indicating human activity. The Animated Character walks through the cave, pausing to point at and highlight geological formations. Red circles appear to emphasize specific features: first, a cluster of stalactites hanging from the ceiling, then a group of stalagmites rising from the floor, and finally, a large column formed by the fusion of stalactite and stalagmite. The character continues to gesture toward these formations, emphasizing their connection. The final scene shows a reflective pool mirroring the cave’s formations, with the character standing in awe, hands on hips, as the video ends with a transition to a striped pattern, suggesting a conclusion or segment break.

active_entities.Animated Character: A cartoon figure in a blue suit and yellow helmet with a headlamp, actively exploring and gesturing toward cave formations, with speech bubbles and red circles highlighting geological features.

segments.caption: The video begins with an animated cave scene illustrating how bacteria in total darkness synthesize inorganic elements into organic compounds that sustain cave life such as algae, invertebrates, salamanders, fish, and bats, with text overlay emphasizing this process. The scene transitions to a woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey polka-dotted sweater, speaking expressively in a studio setting adorned with plants and a toucan decoration. The video then cuts to a vibrant, crowded cave interior illuminated with colorful lights, showcasing tourists exploring the rock formations. This is followed by a sign in a natural, arid landscape requiring a screening pass before entering any cave to prevent the spread of white-nose syndrome in bats. A close-up of a bat hanging upside down in a rocky crevice appears next, followed by a shot of tree roots penetrating red rock with the text 'BIOLOGICAL WEATHERING' overlaid. The final scene shifts to a bustling urban street with a large artificial cherry blossom tree, where people walk and sit, and the same 'BIOLOGICAL WEATHERING' text remains on screen, now juxtaposed with a colorful logo reading '老歌音乐汇' (Old Songs Music Gathering) above the tree.

active_entities.Woman: A woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey sweater with black polka dots, speaking expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background.

discovered_new_entities.Animated Cave Scene: An animated depiction of a dark cave environment with green algae, a slimy salamander, fish, and a spider, accompanied by text explaining how bacteria produce organic compounds in total darkness to feed cave life.
discovered_new_entities.Crowded Cave Interior: A real, brightly lit cave filled with tourists, featuring colorful lighting on stalactites and stalagmites, creating a vibrant and busy atmosphere.
discovered_new_entities.Screening Pass Sign: A white sign in a dry, shrub-filled landscape stating 'SCREENING PASS REQUIRED BEFORE ENTERING ANY CAVE' to prevent the spread of white-nose syndrome in bats, with a bat illustration and instructions for obtaining free passes at the Visitor Center.
discovered_new_entities.Bat Close-Up: A close-up of a bat hanging upside down in a rocky crevice, showing its fur, wings, and facial features in natural daylight.
discovered_new_entities.Tree Roots in Rock: A shot of tree roots spreading over and into red sandstone, illustrating biological weathering, with the text 'BIOLOGICAL WEATHERING' overlaid in a dark green banner.
discovered_new_entities.Urban Street Scene: A busy city street with a large artificial cherry blossom tree, people walking and sitting on steps, and storefronts with Chinese signage, including a prominent logo '老歌音乐汇' (Old Songs Music Gathering) above the tree, with the 'BIOLOGICAL WEATHERING' banner still visible at the bottom.

segments.caption: The video begins with a bustling urban street scene, featuring a large artificial cherry blossom tree with the logo '老歌音乐汇' (Old Songs Music Gathering) prominently displayed above it. People are walking, sitting on steps, and engaging in daily activities, with storefronts and Chinese signage visible in the background. The scene transitions to a close-up of a weathered, porous rock surface, followed by a shot of green, cup-shaped lichen growing on mossy ground. Next, a large boulder covered in patches of green and grey lichen is shown in a grassy, open field. The video then shifts to an aerial view of a yellow mining excavator breaking rock in a quarry, followed by a tractor pulling a plow through a field, turning over dark soil. The final segment features a woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey polka-dot sweater, speaking expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background. She gestures as she speaks, and a graphic appears on the right side of the screen with the text 'NEXT TIME: HOW DO RIVERS SHAPE THE LANDSCAPE?' on a grid-patterned background with a globe and compass icon.

active_entities.Denudation Explanation Graphic: An animated graphic with camping gear and text explaining weathering and erosion as stages of denudation, set against a dark green background.
active_entities.Frost Action Scene: A close-up of large, fractured grey rocks in a rocky, grassy terrain, with the text 'FROST ACTION' displayed in a dark blue banner.
active_entities.Scree Scene: A wide-angle shot of a rocky mountain slope covered in loose, broken rock fragments, with the text 'SCREE' displayed in a dark green banner.
active_entities.Animated Bicycle and Rock Illustration: A teal-background animated scene showing a rusted bicycle and a cartoon rock character, both labeled with 'IRON OXIDE (RUST)' and 'IRON', with a text box defining chemical weathering.
active_entities.Acropolis Panorama: A wide scenic view of the Acropolis in Athens during sunset, featuring the Parthenon and surrounding ruins under a colorful sky.
active_entities.Parthenon Columns Close-Up: A zoomed-in view of the weathered stone columns of the Parthenon, showing signs of erosion and discoloration under a bright blue sky.
active_entities.Karst Topography Graphic: A vibrant orange graphic titled 'KARST TOPOGRAPHY,' showing a world map of carbonate rock distribution and a cross-section diagram explaining how dissolving bedrock creates sinkholes, caves, and springs, associated with limestone, marble, and gypsum.
active_entities.Chemical Equation Overlay: A text box displaying the chemical reaction H₂O + CO₂ ⇌ H₂CO₃ (Water + Carbon Dioxide ⇌ Carbonic Acid), with labels for each component in distinct colors.
active_entities.Carbonation Title Card: A bold, textured blue banner with the word 'CARBONATION' in white, accompanied by an animated miner holding a soda can in a diamond-shaped frame.
active_entities.Water Dripping from Mossy Rock: A natural scene showing water droplets falling from a moss-covered rock in a forested environment, illustrating the process of carbonation.
active_entities.Calcium Carbonate Reaction Graphic: An animated graphic with camping gear and text explaining that calcium carbonate reacts with carbonic acid to form calcium bicarbonate, which dissolves in water, weakening limestone.
active_entities.Animated Character: A cartoon figure in a blue suit and yellow helmet with a headlamp, actively exploring and gesturing toward cave formations, with speech bubbles and red circles highlighting geological features.
active_entities.Aerial View of Karst Plateau, Slovenia: An aerial shot of a village nestled among green fields and limestone cliffs, with text labels identifying other karst regions appearing sequentially on screen.
active_entities.Sinkhole and River Scenes: Aerial views of turquoise water-filled sinkholes and a river flowing through steep rock canyons, with the word 'SINKHOLES' displayed in a maroon banner over a large sinkhole surrounded by autumn foliage.
active_entities.Animated Cave Scene: An animated depiction of a dark cave environment with green algae, a slimy salamander, fish, and a spider, accompanied by text explaining how bacteria produce organic compounds in total darkness to feed cave life.
active_entities.Crowded Cave Interior: A real, brightly lit cave filled with tourists, featuring colorful lighting on stalactites and stalagmites, creating a vibrant and busy atmosphere.
active_entities.Screening Pass Sign: A white sign in a dry, shrub-filled landscape stating 'SCREENING PASS REQUIRED BEFORE ENTERING ANY CAVE' to prevent the spread of white-nose syndrome in bats, with a bat illustration and instructions for obtaining free passes at the Visitor Center.
active_entities.Bat Close-Up: A close-up of a bat hanging upside down in a rocky crevice, showing its fur, wings, and facial features in natural daylight.
active_entities.Tree Roots in Rock: A shot of tree roots spreading over and into red sandstone, illustrating biological weathering, with the text 'BIOLOGICAL WEATHERING' overlaid in a dark green banner.

discovered_new_entities.Weathered Rock Surface: A close-up of a light-colored, porous rock with numerous holes, possibly from biological or chemical weathering, set against a dark, mossy background.
discovered_new_entities.Lichen Growth on Mossy Ground: A cluster of green, cup-shaped lichen growing on a bed of moss and soil, with thin grasses and orange plant stems visible around it.
discovered_new_entities.Lichen-Covered Boulder: A large, rounded boulder covered in patches of green and grey lichen, resting in a grassy, open field with sparse vegetation.
discovered_new_entities.Mining Excavator in Quarry: An aerial view of a yellow mining excavator actively breaking rock in a quarry, surrounded by loose stone and dust.
discovered_new_entities.Tractor Plowing Field: A rusty orange tractor pulling a plow through a field, turning over dark soil, with a driver visible in the cab and a hazy sky in the background.
discovered_new_entities.Next Time Graphic: A graphic on the right side of the screen with a grid background, a globe icon, and the text 'NEXT TIME: HOW DO RIVERS SHAPE THE LANDSCAPE?' in bold, with a compass icon at the bottom.

segments.caption: The video segment transitions from a closing credits sequence to a production company logo. The credits are displayed on a sepia-toned map background, with a small inset video of the Woman speaking expressively in a studio setting, surrounded by green plants and a toucan decoration. She gestures with her hands as the credits roll, listing roles such as Executive Producers, Host, Producer/Director/Editor, and others, including Script Editor, Writer, Consultant, Creative Team, Vice Principals, and sources for images and footage. Prominent on-screen elements include a 'SUBSCRIBE!' button with the Crash Course logo, a 'Thought Café' logo, and a 'SUPPORT US ON PATREON!' call-to-action with a grid graphic. In the top right corner, a 'CRASH COURSE MERCH DFTBA.com' banner features a mug and a sticker sheet. After the credits conclude, the screen transitions to a bright blue background with animated, colorful lines forming a stylized 'C' logo, which then resolves into the 'COMPLEXLY' logo on a dark navy background, signaling the end of the segment.

active_entities.Woman: A woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey sweater with black polka dots, speaking expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background.

discovered_new_entities.Crash Course Merch Banner: A red banner in the top right corner displaying 'CRASH COURSE MERCH DFTBA.com' with a white mug labeled 'I DRINK BECAUSE I AM' and a colorful sticker sheet featuring a cartoon character.
discovered_new_entities.SUBSCRIBE! Button: A circular button with a red apple inside a blue diamond, labeled 'SUBSCRIBE!' in white text on a maroon background.
discovered_new_entities.Thought Café Logo: A circular logo with a pink, crumpled paper design and the text 'Thought Café' in white, accompanied by the label 'ART & ANIMATION BY THOUGHT CAFÉ'.
discovered_new_entities.SUPPORT US ON PATREON! Graphic: A grid-based graphic with a red vertical bar and a white circle, labeled 'SUPPORT US ON PATREON!' in white text on a maroon background.
discovered_new_entities.CREDITS Text Box: A semi-transparent beige box listing production roles and contributors, including Executive Producers, Host, Producer/Director/Editor, Script Editor, Writer, Consultant, Creative Team, Vice Principals, Filmed At, Follow Us, and Images and Footage sources.
discovered_new_entities.MORE CRASH COURSE Button: A maroon rectangular button in the bottom left corner with the text 'MORE CRASH COURSE' in white, set against a map background.
discovered_new_entities.COMPLEXLY Logo: A stylized blue 'C' logo composed of concentric, segmented lines, followed by the word 'COMPLEXLY' in white text on a dark navy background.

entity_library.Woman: A woman with long, wavy blonde hair, wearing a grey sweater with black polka dots, speaking expressively in a studio setting with plants and a toucan decoration in the background.
entity_library.Plate Boundary Diagrams: Four labeled diagrams illustrating Divergent, Convergent, Subducting Convergent, and Transform plate boundaries, each with arrows and cross-sections showing tectonic movement.
entity_library.Animated Map with Text Box: A stylized red background with bold white text stating 'WHEN WATER TURNS INTO ICE IT INCREASES IN VOLUME BY 9%', followed by an animated grey pipe with a cartoon rock character with legs and a sad face standing on it as blue water freezes and expands beneath, causing the pipe to crack.
entity_library.Mountain Landscape: A panoramic view of snow-covered, rugged mountain peaks under a blue sky with clouds, featuring rocky terrain and glaciers, with the text 'FREEZE-THAW CYCLES' overlaid.
entity_library.Prayer Flags: A dense cluster of colorful, fluttering prayer flags in red, blue, yellow, green, and white, set against a mountainous backdrop with people visible in the distance.
entity_library.Waterfall Scene: A steep, moss-covered cliff with multiple cascading waterfalls flowing into a turbulent river below, surrounded by greenery and rocks.
entity_library.Animated Desert Scene: A cartoon-style desert landscape with sand dunes, cacti, a cartoon character, and multiple text boxes providing facts about deserts, including their role in fossil preservation and economic significance.
entity_library.Crash Course Geography Title Card: A vibrant title card featuring a stylized Earth, a cartoon character, and the text 'Crash Course Geography' on a space background with stars and a moon.
entity_library.Hydrologic, Rock, and Tectonic Cycle Dia: A comprehensive animated diagram showing the interconnected Hydrologic, Rock, and Tectonic cycles, with labeled processes such as evaporation, weathering, subduction, and melting, and anthropomorphized rocks illustrating the Rock Cycle.
entity_library.Rock Cycle Animation: An orange-background animation focusing on the Rock Cycle, showing cartoon rocks (sedimentary sandstone, metamorphic gneiss, igneous granite, magma) with legs and faces, and text explaining the role of endogenic and exogenic forces.
entity_library.Soil Cross-Section: A close-up view of layered soil with visible roots and grass at the surface, showing distinct strata of earth and organic material.
